info.title: Klicklocal Scheduler API
info.description: Social media scheduling SaaS API. Authenticate with Bearer token (Laravel Sanctum). Workspace-scoped routes accept `X-Workspace-Id` header or `workspace_id` query/body.

post.summary: Start or resume email-only onboarding registration

get.summary: Get authenticated user and workspace context

post.summary: Analyze a business website for onboarding (public, rate-limited)

put.summary: Create or update workspace business profile

post.summary: Generate AI image for social content

generation_id.description: Link image to an existing AI generation

get.summary: List AI generation history for a workspace

post.summary: Create and immediately publish a post to a connected social account

422.description: No connected account or validation error

get.description: Comments are pulled from connected social accounts by the periodic sync. Sentiment is assigned asynchronously by the AI classifier (batched, German-aware); filter with `sentiment` once `sentiment_classified_at` is set.

post.description: If `sentiment` is provided it is stored as-is and marked classified (the AI sweep will not overwrite it). If omitted, sentiment defaults to neutral and the hourly AI classifier sweep assigns it.

get.summary: Sentiment counts for the workspace comments
get.description: Counts comments per sentiment class, optionally restricted to one platform. Unclassified comments count as neutral (their stored default).

post.summary: Generate an AI reply suggestion for a comment
post.description: Stores the suggestion on `suggested_reply` (regenerating overwrites it). Gated like /ai/generate: requires an active subscription (402 otherwise) and the `ai_generation` plan feature (403 otherwise).
Stores `reply_text` and `replied_at`. Only synced comments (with a provider `external_id`) can be answered; manually created comments are rejected with 422, as is a second reply.

422.description: Manual comment, already replied, or validation error

put.summary: Update platform roles for a user

post.summary: Grant demo subscription period to workspace

get.summary: List past website analysis runs for the current admin

post.summary: Queue a business website analysis (Claude Agent SDK)

200.description: Run status and result when finished

patch.summary: Activate or deactivate AI prompt template

post.summary: Manually assign quota add-on to workspace

external_id.description: Provider comment id (null for manually created comments)

sentiment.description: Assigned asynchronously by the AI sentiment classifier after ingestion (defaults to neutral until classified).

sentiment_classified_at.description: When the sentiment was classified (AI or explicit manual value). Null = not yet classified; such rows are swept hourly.

suggested_reply.description: Last AI-generated reply suggestion (overwritten on regenerate).

reply_text.description: The reply that was sent. Null until the comment is answered.

WorkspaceIdHeader.name: X-Workspace-Id
WorkspaceIdHeader.description: Active workspace ID (alternative to workspace_id query/body).

sanctum.description: Paste only the token from login/register (e.g. 18|abc...). Do not type "Bearer" — Swagger adds it automatically.

tags.name: Comments
tags.description: Synced social media comments with AI sentiment classification

tags.name: Billing
tags.description: Subscriptions, usage, invoices, and quota top-ups
